charter: Revise planning docs to align more tightly with VISION.md. Keep V1 narrow, but change the plan so V1 includes minimal domain grouping instead of cutting skill composition entirely. Clarify whether tusq serve proves callable execution or only describe-only MCP, and make that wording explicit and honest. Add explicit language that runtime learning is a deferred core pillar, not just a normal omitted feature.
acceptance_contract: PM_SIGNOFF.md reflects minimal domain grouping in V1
SYSTEM_SPEC.md and ROADMAP.md clearly explain tusq serve scope without overstating callable execution
PM_SIGNOFF.md explicitly frames runtime learning as deferred core pillar

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded

archived_reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded
